title: Episode 1
overview: Konzen Dōji brings the monkey demon Son Goku to live in Heaven.  Goku befriends the War Prince, Nataku, and unleashes his uncontrollable power after Nataku's death.  Konzen Dōji, Goku, and their friends Tenpō and Kenren must battle Heaven's armies while they attempt to flee to the Lower World.

title: Episode 2
overview: Konzen, Goku, Tenpō, and Kenren continue in their attempt to flee Heaven for the Lower World.

title: Episode 3
overview: Konzen, Goku, Tenpō, and Kenren's attempt to flee Heaven for the Lower World comes to a conclusion.

title: Kōga no Shō
overview: Moving back in time, Tenpō recounts the Heavenly Western Army First Unit's adventures.
